messages.noAccountDesc: You need to add an account first using `/accounts`.
messages.maxSanityDesc: Your sanity is already at **{currentStamina}/{maxStamina}** ({staminaPercent}%). No reminders needed!
messages.reminderPromptDesc:
**Current Sanity:** {currentStamina}/{maxStamina} ({staminaPercent}%)

Select a preset or use `/sanity <amount>` for a custom reminder:
messages.reminderPromptFooter: You will receive a DM when your sanity reaches the selected amount
messages.invalidAmountDesc: The target sanity ({targetStamina}) exceeds your maximum sanity ({maxStamina}).
messages.alreadyReachedDesc: Your current sanity is **{currentStamina}**, which is already at or above your target of **{targetStamina}**.
messages.reminderSetDesc: You will be reminded when your sanity reaches **{targetStamina}** ({targetPercent}%).
messages.reminderSetFooter: You will receive a DM when your sanity reaches the target amount
messages.reminderSetFooterStamina: You will receive a DM when your stamina reaches the target amount
messages.autoEnabledDesc: Hourly checks are enabled. Tata will check once per hour, and if your sanity is below **{threshold}%**, it will set a reminder for when your sanity is full.
messages.autoEnabledPausedDesc: Hourly checks are enabled, but currently paused because you already have an active sanity reminder. Checks resume automatically once that reminder is fulfilled.
messages.autoEnabledFooter: Auto checks pause while a sanity reminder is active and resume after it is sent.
messages.autoDisabledDesc: Hourly auto checks have been disabled. You can still set manual reminders with `/sanity <amount>`.
